ι : Type
inst✝⁵ : Fintype ι
inst✝⁴ : Nonempty ι
inst✝³ : DecidableEq ι
F : Type

inst✝ : DecidableEq F
deg : ℕ
domain : ι ↪ F
δ : NNReal
hδ : δ ≤ relativeUniqueDecodingRadius ↑(ReedSolomon.code domain deg)
⊢ δ_ε_correlatedAgreementAffineLines (↑(ReedSolomon.code domain deg)) δ
    (ProximityGap.errorBound ι inst✝⁵ F inst✝² inst✝¹ δ deg domain)

proof:
apply correlatedAgreement_of_proximityGap
  apply proximity_gap_RSCodes
  calc δ ≤ relativeUniqueDecodingRadius (ReedSolomon.code domain deg) := hδ
       _ ≤ 1 - (ReedSolomonCode.sqrtRate deg domain) := relativeUniqueDecodingRadius_le_Johnson
